plan_summary: Live client sites in progress. Blog/Attractions WYSIWYG editors shipped. Language filtering fixed. Focus shifting to site go-live, Repuso reviews integration, translation pipeline, plugin management, and theme marketplace.

tasks.title: Footer — Terms and Privacy links broken
tasks.description: Terms and Privacy page links in the footer are not working. Investigate and fix link generation/routing.

tasks.title: Contact page — map sizing
tasks.description: Map on contact page is incorrectly sized. Fix map container dimensions and responsive behaviour.

tasks.title: Footer — all page links not showing
tasks.description: Footer should display links to all site pages. Currently missing some or all page links.

tasks.title: Site go-live setup/checklist
tasks.description: Create a go-live checklist workflow — DNS, SSL, content review, SEO, analytics, booking test. Could be UI-driven or documented process.

tasks.title: Repuso API connection (white-label)
tasks.description: Connect to Repuso API for white-label reviews integration. Fetch and display reviews without Repuso branding.

tasks.title: Blog page — header/subheader + category translations
tasks.description: Blog page header and subheader text needs multilingual translation support. Blog category names should also translate.

tasks.title: Attractions page — header/subheader + category translations
tasks.description: Attractions page header and subheader text needs multilingual translation support. Attraction category names should also translate.

tasks.title: Room page — Reviews tab (Repuso widget ID per room)
tasks.description: Add a Reviews tab to the room detail page showing Repuso reviews. Each room can have its own Repuso widget ID.

tasks.title: Cloudflare — speed optimisation strategy
tasks.description: Plan and implement Cloudflare optimisation: caching rules, minification, image optimisation (Polish/Mirage), page rules for static assets, rocket loader evaluation.

tasks.title: Plugin management — repo, version control, downloadable from GAS
tasks.description: Set up plugin repo and version control. Make plugin downloadable from GAS Admin. Ensure Claude Code is aware of plugin structure for automated deploys.

tasks.title: Partner/Elevate white-label URLs — branded domains
tasks.description: Enable branded domains per partner (e.g. Elevate gets their own domain for the portal, lites, blogs). Routing, SSL, and theme per partner.

tasks.title: Theme marketplace — add new themes via UI
tasks.description: Build a theme marketplace in GAS Admin. Allow adding new themes via UI, open to third-party theme builders, manage/preview/activate themes within GAS Admin.

tasks.title: Elevate API - Webhook Live Testing
tasks.description: Get Adi's webhook endpoint, configure, test end-to-end booking.created and booking.cancelled
subtasks: Live end-to-end test with real booking
tasks.notes: API v7.3 docs sent. Section 15 removed. Awaiting Adi's endpoint.

tasks.title: Elevate White-Label Solution
tasks.description: Branded portal, lites, agents, blog under Elevate domains with CSS theming
tasks.notes: Subdomains on GAS infrastructure, WP on Elevate's VPS

tasks.title: Calry Integration via Elevate
tasks.description: GAS wizards for CM connections that route through Elevate's Calry account
subtasks: Connection wizards per CM (Lodgify, Guesty, etc.)
Data flow: GAS wizard → Calry → Elevate → GAS
tasks.notes: Elevate already connected to Calry. Teo confirmed CalryLink approach.

tasks.title: Payment Systems by Region
tasks.description: Support multiple payment providers for different regions
tasks.notes: Migrating clients from different regions need their local payment systems

tasks.title: Language Module
tasks.description: Multi-language support for websites and content
subtasks: Multi-language content fields for all pages
Fix JS-rendered hardcoded English strings in booking widget
tasks.notes: Multilingual fields built. Translation gaps in JS-rendered content being fixed.

tasks.title: iCal Import Interface
tasks.description: Import availability from any CM via iCal feeds
tasks.notes: Opens door to Airbnb hosts - huge market

tasks.title: Channel Manager Database
tasks.description: Database of CMs with integration status and request voting
subtasks: Search/browse CM list in connection wizard
Email template to send to CM requesting connection
tasks.notes: If we hit stubborn CMs with hundreds of requests, they will connect

tasks.title: Travel Agent Portal
tasks.description: Agents login, browse properties, make bookings with commission
tasks.notes: Major revenue channel - agents bring bookings

tasks.title: More Templates & Style Presets
tasks.description: Additional website templates and style variations

tasks.title: Onboarding UI - Traffic Light System
tasks.description: Guided setup with progress tracking and nag system
subtasks: All green = ready for travel agents

tasks.title: Page Builder for About/Gallery/Dining
tasks.description: Simple drag-and-drop section builder
tasks.notes: Keep simple - vertical stack, no complex nesting

tasks.title: Hostvana AI Chat Integration
tasks.description: Pre-booking guest chat widget with AI responses, post-booking handoff to CM
tasks.notes: API spec v1.0 complete (gas-hostvana-api-spec_3.docx). Awaiting Hostvana development.

tasks.title: Search Button Color Fix
tasks.description: Homepage hero search button doesn't change color from GAS Admin

completed.title: Blog Modal Redesign + WYSIWYG Editors
completed.description: Replaced raw HTML textareas with contenteditable WYSIWYG editors in blog and attraction modals. Blog modal redesigned to single-column layout with image upload, scheduling, metadata grid.

completed.title: Language Filtering for Blog & Attraction Modals
completed.description: Added filterModalLanguages() to hide tabs/inputs for non-account languages. Fixed hardcoded language arrays. Blog generation now loads language settings before translating.

completed.title: Blog Category FK Constraint Fix
completed.description: Dropped blog_categories_client_id_fkey FK constraint. Category INSERT wrapped in try/catch. Modal adds missing category as dropdown option.

completed.title: Blog Ideas Sub-Tabs from Feed Names
completed.description: Added feed_id column to content_ideas. iCal/RSS fetch stores feed_id. Sub-tab bar in Ideas tab groups ideas by source feed.

completed.title: Favicon API GET Endpoint + Swagger Docs
completed.description: Added GET /api/partner/websites/:websiteId/icons endpoint. Updated Swagger with GET method, schemas, and examples.

completed.title: Reviews App Settings + Homepage Toggle
completed.description: Added Reviews app settings (colors, fonts, toggle). Show/hide View All Reviews button on homepage.

completed.title: Elevate Partner API v7.3 Documentation
completed.description: Definitive API documentation covering all 14 sections. Removed Section 15 (Channel Manager Updates) as not relevant to Elevate's direct integration. Includes full webhook schemas, curl testing examples, signature verification.

completed.title: Discover St Charles - Font Fix
completed.description: Fixed font mismatch on room/booking pages. Plugin CSS was overriding site fonts. Added Inter + Playfair Display overrides to assets/css/style.css.

completed.title: Beds24 Setup Instructions Update
completed.description: Replaced technical instructions with clear 6-step guide in GAS Admin: Settings → Properties → Access, copy webhook, create prop key, test, camera icon, import.

completed.title: Rocket Stay Custom Site - Complete Build
completed.description: Full custom site build at bookrocketstay.custom.gas.travel including contact page with dual forms, footer with forced contact info, terms page with 26 rental rules, privacy redirect, dark theme.

completed.title: Discover St Charles Custom Site
completed.description: Full custom dark theme site build at discoverstcharles.custom.gas.travel with video hero, Hostaway sync, custom CSS for booking plugin dark mode, reviews integration.

completed.title: Elevate Partner API - Room Activation & Content Endpoints
completed.description: Added room activation/deactivation endpoints, website content management API with 22 section schemas, media upload endpoint.

completed.title: Custom Domain Functionality
completed.description: API endpoints for custom domain connection on WordPress multisite. Automated Nginx configuration and SSL certificate generation via Let's Encrypt.

completed.title: GasSync Unified Abstraction Layer
completed.description: Comprehensive unified system for connecting to multiple channel managers (Beds24, Hostaway, Calry). Scalable architecture replacing direct integrations.

completed.title: Multilingual Translation - Booking Widget
completed.description: Added French, Dutch, Spanish, German translations for booking interface. Addressed JavaScript-rendered content with hardcoded English strings.

completed.title: Elevate Partner API v7.0 - Core Endpoints
completed.description: Full partner API with tenant management, property/room CRUD, images, pricing, availability, room types, websites, Stripe config, analytics, webhooks.

completed.title: FAQ Schema Persistence Fix
completed.description: Fixed FAQ schema data not persisting across web builder, blog posts, and attractions sections.

completed.title: Property-Level Stripe Integration
completed.description: Stripe credentials configured per property allowing different Stripe accounts. Multi-unit booking rule: same Stripe = multi-unit allowed.

completed.title: Hostaway Integration
completed.description: Full Hostaway channel manager integration with OAuth wizard, property import, images, availability sync, reservations sync (bidirectional), webhook support, and scheduled auto-sync every 15 minutes.

completed.title: Beds24 Wizard - Large Property Support
completed.description: V6 wizard allows V2 key only at signup, pull properties from V2, add V1 key and property codes per property later, webhook per property, refresh button, per-property traffic light status.

completed.title: Image Reordering with Drag & Drop
completed.description: Fixed image gallery reordering - arrows now left/right for horizontal layout, added drag-and-drop support.

completed.title: FAQ Schema with AI Generation
completed.description: Added FAQ Schema sections to all pages with AI-powered FAQ generation via Claude API.

completed.title: SEO Meta AI Generation
completed.description: AI-powered meta title and description generation for all pages.

completed.title: Enable/Disable Toggles for Featured & About
completed.description: Added section enable toggles for Featured Properties and About sections on homepage.

completed.title: Menu Active Underline Color
completed.description: Added Menu Active Underline Color control to Header settings.

completed.title: Textarea Styling Improvements
completed.description: All textareas now 100% width, deeper height, no drag resize handles.

completed.title: Meta Fields Save Fix
completed.description: Fixed meta title/description fields not saving on all pages.

completed.title: Blog/Attractions Plan-Based Unlock
completed.description: Blog and Attractions tabs in Website Builder now check plan features.
